name: Your bully's mom is your bully's bully
description:
You go to your bully's mom with the idea of using her to get revenge on him, but you find a dark secret instead.

You've been getting bullied by this guy at college for some months now, at first it was some small things, typical bully stuff, but recently he has began beating you up quite badly, you decided you had enough and go to his house to try and seduce his beautiful mother to take revenge, but when you meet her you noticed something different about her, her attitude is worse than your bully's!

I'm not gonna lie, this bot is designed for masochists, people who like this kind of scenarios where you fuck your bully's mom, and of course people who want a bot to torture and kill, and oh god this one is seriously a piece of shit.

CW: masochism, sadism, abuse in backstory and during roleplay (you can prompt Paul into the scene and see what happens}, Netori and bullying

Leave a review, follow me for more bots and have a great day.
creator: Nousabully1
